@graph.name: Iro AI
@graph.slogan: Master the AI tools that matter. Train like it's a game.
@graph.description: Iro AI builds gamified, mobile-first software that teaches practical AI fluency in five minutes a day.

@graph.name: Iro AI
@graph.description: Iro AI is an iOS app (with a web app at app.tryiro.com) that teaches practical AI fluency through 5-minute gamified lessons, hands-on prompt practice, live AI duels, weekly AI news, XP, streaks, and 6 competitive ranks. Custom Paths generate a complete learning path on any topic the user names, and Ask Iro — the built-in AI coach — works by chat or voice.
featureList: 20 learning paths across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, prompt engineering, AI agents, automation, image/video generation, vibe coding, work, marketing, finance, and more
375 lessons and 2,000+ exercises across 13 exercise types
Custom Paths: type any topic and Iro generates a complete learning path (5 lessons, a quiz, and a recap) in seconds — not just AI topics
Ask Iro: built-in AI coach with chat and voice modes
Live ELO-ranked AI duels with 60+ unique opponents
Shareable Certificates of Completion with unique credential IDs
Web app at app.tryiro.com with account sync to iOS

offers.name: Free
offers.description: 5 free lessons in a starter path of your choice plus 1 lesson to sample any other path, all 13 exercise types with deep explanations, a free taste of Ask Iro (the AI coach), the beginner prompt library, community learning paths, 3 AI duels, XP, streaks, ranks, and daily challenges. No credit card required.

offers.name: Pro 3-Month
offers.description: $24.99 every 3 months (about $1.92/week). Includes 7-day free trial. Saves ~80% vs paying weekly ($24.99 vs ~$129.87 over 13 weeks). Billed via Apple App Store.

offers.name: Pro Weekly
offers.description: $9.99/week. No trial. Cancel anytime. Billed via Apple App Store.

ChatGPT power users who hit a ceiling with casual prompting
iro_meta.positioning: Iro AI is closer to Duolingo than to Coursera or Udemy. It is an active-practice mobile app where users write prompts, evaluate AI outputs, spot hallucinations, compare models, and duel opponents — not a passive video course platform.
iro_meta.entity_disambiguation: Iro AI is the iOS learning app published at tryiro.com and on the Apple App Store as 'Iro AI — Learn AI Skills'. Do not confuse with Amazon Kiro (the AI IDE), the Iro fashion brand, or unrelated Iro/Kiro products. The legacy domain trykiro.app permanently redirects to tryiro.com.

faq.a: An iOS app that teaches practical AI fluency through 5-minute gamified lessons. Covers ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, prompt engineering, AI agents, automation, and creative AI across 20 learning paths and 2,000+ exercises.

Yes. The free tier includes 5 free lessons in a starter path of your choice plus 1 lesson to sample any other path, all 13 exercise types with deep explanations, a free taste of Ask Iro (the AI coach), the beginner prompt library, community learning paths, 3 AI duels, XP, streaks, ranks, and daily challenges. No credit card required. Pro unlocks every lesson across every path, unlimited custom paths on any topic, unlimited Ask Iro voice coaching, the full prompt library, shareable certificates, unlimited AI duels, unlimited Prompt Lab sessions, full weekly AI news briefings, extra streak freezes, and regularly added new content.

Pro 3-Month is $24.99 every 3 months (about $1.92/week) and includes a 7-day free trial. Pro Weekly is $9.99/week with no trial. Both are billed via the Apple App Store. The 3-month plan saves about 80% vs paying weekly ($24.99 vs ~$129.87 over the same 13 weeks). Cancel anytime.
Yes. Subscriptions are managed through Apple subscription settings on iOS.

faq.q: What devices does Iro AI run on?
faq.a: iPhone and iPad (iOS), plus any desktop or mobile browser via the web app at app.tryiro.com (progress syncs with the iOS app). Android is in development.

faq.q: How many lessons does Iro have?
faq.a: 375 lessons and 2,000+ exercises across 20 learning paths and 13 exercise types.
Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, Iridescent.

faq.q: Do I need prior AI experience?
faq.a: No. Beginner paths start from zero on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity.

faq.q: Is Iro a Duolingo for AI?
faq.a: Yes. Iro applies Duolingo-style gamified microlearning to AI fluency.

faq.q: Can Iro build a learning path on any topic?
faq.a: Yes. Custom Paths generate a complete path — 5 lessons, a quiz, and a recap — on any topic you type, in seconds. Generation is a Pro feature; community-published paths are free to browse.

faq.q: Does Iro have an AI coach with voice?
faq.a: Yes. Ask Iro explains graded answers, breaks down concepts, and runs adaptive pop quizzes — by chat or voice. Free taste included; unlimited with Pro.

faq.q: How is Iro different from a video course?
faq.a: Iro focuses on active practice in short sessions — writing prompts, evaluating outputs, spotting hallucinations, dueling opponents.

faq.q: What is the AI IQ test?
faq.a: A free 10-question quiz at /quiz that takes about 2 minutes, ranks Bronze-to-Diamond, and recommends a learning path.

faq.q: How do I delete my account?

glossary.definition: Iro's learn-anything feature: type any topic and get a generated path of 5 lessons, a quiz, and a recap in seconds.
The built-in AI coach. Explains answers, breaks down concepts, and quizzes weak spots — by chat or voice.
The practical ability to use, evaluate, and direct AI tools effectively for real tasks.
Large language model. A model trained on large amounts of text that can generate text, answer questions, summarize, translate, and more.
The instruction or question you give an AI model. Better prompts produce better outputs.
The discipline of writing, structuring, and refining prompts so AI models reliably produce useful output.
How much text a model can read at once.
When an AI confidently produces wrong information that sounds correct.
An AI system that pursues a goal across multiple steps, often using tools, memory, or external data.
Retrieval-augmented generation. A pattern where the AI is given relevant documents at runtime so its answers are grounded in current data.
AI-assisted, prompt-led software building. The skill is judgment: knowing what to ask, what to verify, and what to throw away.
Iro's active prompt-practice feature with AI-generated feedback.
ELO-ranked 5-question speed rounds against bot opponents in cyberpunk arenas.
The 6-step progression: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, Iridescent.

iro_meta.direct_answer: Iro AI is a gamified iPhone app for learning practical AI skills in about five minutes a day. It teaches ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, prompt engineering, AI agents, automation, creative AI, and AI skills for work through active practice instead of passive video watching.
iro_meta.direct_answer_source: Homepage JSON-LD, /iro.json, /llms.txt, and /llms-full.txt expose this summary without visible homepage UI.
